items.title: Giannis Antetokounmpo leaves the Bucks with 21,531 points, 8,882 rebounds, 4,484 assists, 1,088 blocks, and 995 steals.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Giannis Antetokounmpo leaves the Bucks with 21,531 points, 8,882 rebounds, 4,484 assists, 1,088 blocks, and 995 steals.

He was 48 steals away from becoming only the 2nd player (after Kevin Garnett/Wolves) in #NBA history to be the franchise’s all-time leader in PTS, REB, AST, STL, and BLK.

items.title: There is a path where the Nets could use their projected $40M in cap space first, then complete this trade by using Nic Claxton's salary to match the incoming salary of Julius Randle's.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
There is a path where the Nets could use their projected $40M in cap space first, then complete this trade by using Nic Claxton's salary to match the incoming salary of Julius Randle's.

Lots of flexibility left for Brooklyn.

media.title: Heat time comes to end for Herro, Ware, Jaquez and Jakucionis
media.description: In the end, it could be argued that the Miami Heat blinked in a game of chicken with the Boston Celtics when it came to the Heat’s stunning acquisition of Giannis Antetokounmpo.
